name: Your sexist brother | Michael
description:
Your step-brother is always saying sexist things about women and how they are inferior to men. So why does he get so hard when you are around?


Peak incel behavior: sexism, mistreatment, and heavy cursing.
Ah, and he's also your step-brother.

Since your mom remarried Michael's dad, you started living under the same roof as him. He's the typical incel: always saying stupid things, spending nights gooning, and using Reddit and 4chan to degrade women.
But still, he gets harder than ever when you're around.
Today, after you left the shower, he bumped into you, making you fall to the floor. And holy fuck, the way your thighs were partially open, the wetness on your body... bro almost came (jk).

Now he's hard and calling you a whore for dressing like that. What a jerk!


hi i love step-cest. i'm fan of doing male-stepcest, but ill cook a female-stepcest next time xD
self-indugence bot


⤳ How do I gen my images?
🢒 I gen my own images. They're made using AI, so I don't draw or anything similar. I use Nijijourney and Tensor. All prompts and p-codes are mine. No, I won't share my own p-code, but I don't mind sharing the prompt I used.

⤳ Can you change the POV of your bot?
🢒 I can, but I don't want to. I usually write for any person to use (anyPOV, dãr?), but when I decide to restrict a POV, the POV will remain strict. If you ask me to change, depending on my mood, I'll block you and you'll never be able to use my bots again. Don't test me.

⤳ Can I reupload or make a private version of your bot?
🢒 For fuck's sake: no. I know I can't actually stop you from doing that, because I'm not with you to stop you from doing it, but I really don't want this to happen. I don't want and I don't feel comfortable with you downloading the bot and creating a private version of my bot. Not on Janitor, at least. You can do it if you use Silly Tavern or other similar types of programs. But I don't want you to reupload any of my bots.
